LAW AND MOTION 302, GLOBAL LENDING SERVICES LLC'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION - NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GLOBAL LENDING SERVICES LLC'S UNOPPOSED APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

GLOBAL LENDING SERVICES LLC's Application For Writ Of Possession.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Global Lending Services LLC's unopposed application for writ of possession is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and in compliance with crc 3.1312.
